open_questions.summary: Resolved by Datoviz commit 8bb192c2da6df70279eedac5b2eaed9f45aab96c: DvzQueryResult now exposes _fields_ and GSP smoke can read required query fields.
Resolved by P005 response: keep debug-json diagnostic, create separate gsp.conformance.fixture schema, start with ADR/spec skeleton before array transport.
Resolved by P006 response: S020 is ADR/spec/negative-conformance first; arbitrary fetch and dynamic extension loading are reserved but rejected by default.
Resolved by P007 response: start with HTTP single-resource as access mechanism and use a preconfigured `.npy` typed array proof before tile pyramids/Zarr/OME-Zarr or JPEG/PNG.

Resolved by P009 response: S024 defines public TextVisual only, defers GlyphVisual/atlases, uses screen-pixel font sizes, radians, explicit anchors, generic font roles, ASCII conformance with Unicode capability gates, and item-level query guidance.

Resolved by P010 response: S025 defines public MeshVisual only, inline indexed triangles, strict 2D flat uniform/per-face RGBA conformance, capability-gated 3D/normals/shading/query, and defers resources/materials/textures/instancing.

Resolved by P011 response: S026 defines ColorScale, canonical named colormaps, explicit linear normalization, scalar image/point/marker color encodings, semantic ColorbarGuide, scalar query payloads, and defers broad colormap/norm/legend behavior.

Resolved by P012 response: S027 is 2D-first with finite invertible affine transforms, deterministic linear View2D, required query inverse payloads, and public 3D camera/projection/controller semantics deferred.
Resolved by P021 response: S037 is View3D navigation plus Datoviz View3D binding; materials/lights/textures remain deferred; legacy 3D math is internal-only reuse.

Resolved by P024 response: S039 accepts only flat Lambert for opaque DATA-space 3D meshes with face normals, scalar ambient, and one DATA-space directional light; vertex normals, Phong, textures, and material objects remain deferred.

Resolved by P025 response: Datoviz S039 flat Lambert should promote only through CPU-resolved exact per-face colors with triangle-expanded constant face colors; native Datoviz lighting is not strict S040 evidence.

Resolved by P027 response: Datoviz should add a unified immutable panel frame snapshot, revisioned views, first-class guides, and retained DATA-space View3D visuals, accepting v0.4-dev API breaks where needed.
Resolved by P028 response: accept backend-neutral query.view3d.mesh_triangle_pick.v1 for opaque DATA-space MeshVisual triangle picking; visual-only/GPU-named picking remains deferred.

recommendations: M239 completed: versioned producer and renderer profiles now separate exact scope, status, limitations, and evidence; runtime snapshots identify them, the public matrix is generated, all 90 normative requirements map to maintained tests, and M240 is running for executable public documentation and migration guidance.

M237 completed: the GSP 0.2 target specification is now about 9,100 words with 90 stable requirements and explicit source dispositions; M238 is running to align the breaking Python protocol and producer APIs without violating ADR-0033.

M236 completed: the protocol-centered site builds strictly, spec/current is explicitly a consolidation draft, and 101 specification/ADR/decision sources are classified with 39 detailed normative sources mapped to GSP 0.2 target chapters; M237 is now running for requirement-level specification detail.

S054 is approved: consolidate GSP 0.2 with deliberate pre-1.0 breaking changes, detailed normative requirements, synchronized implementation and conformance, executable public documentation, and traceable commits; preserve ADR-0033 producer/session ownership and do not publish, tag, push, or merge.

M235 evidence addendum completed: 25/25 isolated live lifecycle probes now include public callback-stopped blocking loops and retained semantic point-data updates with changed live captures; keep general Display.update, user-close observation, and thread-affinity contracts deferred.

M235 completed: bounded Datoviz blocking, explicit one-frame polling, cleanup, and retained View2D capture evidence passed 15/15 isolated iterations. A minimal explicit experimental session preview is ready for implementation; keep user-close observation, retained visual-data replacement, and hidden non-blocking ownership deferred.

M234 completed: zero-size generated Datoviz panel-frame ctypes records caused all three S051 native failures; GSP now rejects incomplete layouts before native calls, the refreshed pack has zero crashes, and 15 isolated lifecycle cycles completed cleanly. Keep the public session preview deferred pending live-window ownership and retained-update evidence.

M233 completed: the public VisPy2 producer acceptance pack records four strict Matplotlib rows, two Datoviz unsupported rows, three isolated Datoviz backend failures, and explicit Texture2D unsupported boundaries; do not publish the post-RC session preview until failures reject before execution and deterministic lifecycle evidence exists.
Do not promote Datoviz query.view3d.mesh_triangle_pick.v1 until upstream Datoviz exposes public canonical mesh face/triangle identity and native tests cover it.

M208 completed: no new Datoviz TextVisual rows promote; isolated text artifacts render with only text/rotation_alpha_ndc strict, while the combined text review still crashes the Datoviz offscreen child.
M214 completed latest Datoviz v0.4-dev generated-binding alignment without aliases, shims, or sibling Datoviz checkout edits.
Do not promote Datoviz guide/View2D strictness: M207 real offscreen evidence crashed for guide rows, and native panel-title evidence remains required.

M210 completed: S050 face-order invariance evidence at artifacts/visual_qa/s050/m218-depth-face-order supports Datoviz meshvisual.positions3d.opaque_depth.v1 only on the retained DATA-space View3D path for fully opaque meshes.

M216 completed: current Datoviz query API uses dvz_panel_query_px; live point identity is proven, image texel/color/value remains unproven, and Datoviz now advertises panel-query plus point-item but not image-texel.
M217 completed: Datoviz offscreen review packs now isolate one child process per case; complete post-report teardown crashes preserve rendered artifacts and record child_teardown_crash evidence.

M215 completed: Datoviz query/readback docs now distinguish capability-gated guide/all-rendered query from still-deferred live rich payload parity, scientific readback, hit_policy=all, and mesh-triangle picking.

M211 completed: P032 accepts projected-NDC face culling as a capability-gated v1 boundary, keeps strict non-opaque 3D alpha deferred, and opens M226 for fixtures/implementation without renderer capability promotion.
M212 completed: P033 accepts query.view3d.mesh_triangle_pick.geometry.v1 and facing.v1 as sibling capabilities while keeping base v1 unchanged; M227 is ready for protocol/fixture implementation.
M204 completed: archived P031 response and accepted unlit Texture2D plus per-vertex UVs as the next material stage via ADR-0029 and spec/visuals/mesh_texture2d_unlit_s050.md.
M218 completed: Texture2D RGBA8 resources, MeshVisual texture2d_unlit fields, per-vertex UV validation, and texture resource resolution helper are implemented without renderer capability promotion.

M219 completed: S050 Texture2D visual-QA fixtures now record texture resources, UV/probe expectations, alpha diagnostics, negative diagnostic metadata, and unsupported backend classification without renderer promotion.

M220 completed: Datoviz v0.4-dev exposes public mesh Texture2D candidate symbols, but strict S050 promotion remains blocked pending sampler, origin, unmanaged RGBA, and unlit multiplication fixture evidence.
M221 completed: Matplotlib direct MeshVisual rendering now rejects texture2d_unlit with meshvisual_material_texture2d_unlit_unsupported instead of silently dropping texture fields.
M222 blocked: Datoviz Texture2D capability advertisement requires M220 sampler, origin, unmanaged RGBA, and unlit multiplication proof before implementation or promotion.
M223 completed: VisPy2 Axes.mesh now emits strict Texture2D resources and texture2d_unlit MeshVisual fields when texture and uvs are supplied together.
M224 completed: capability/docs audit now distinguishes protocol validation, VisPy2 producer support, Matplotlib unsupported diagnostics, and Datoviz blocked renderer promotion.
M225 completed: S050 Texture2D closeout records protocol/fixture/producer support, Matplotlib unsupported policy, Datoviz blocked promotion, validation evidence, and remaining blockers.

M226 completed: projected-NDC mesh face-culling helpers and Matplotlib CPU mesh-pick culling fixtures are implemented without renderer capability promotion; M227 is the next ready query-payload branch.

M227 completed: geometry/facing mesh-pick payload protocol helpers, validators, and Matplotlib CPU-reference fixtures are implemented without mutating identity-only v1 or advertising Datoviz geometry capabilities.

M228 completed: public sampled-field mesh texture rendering exists, but Datoviz Texture2D strict promotion remains blocked by missing convenience upload symbol, DATA-role crash, origin mismatch, non-nearest/blended samples, non-exact multiplication, and teardown abort evidence.
M131 remains deferred until the user explicitly approves target version, package version update, tag creation, and publication target.

M229 completed: GSP now accepts Datoviz pre-RC sampled-field image and View2D descriptor APIs; the S028 compatibility pack against api/pre-rc-cleanup recorded 12 Datoviz strict rows, 4 adapted text rows, and 14 native SIGSEGV crash rows. Keep M222 blocked until Texture2D runtime blockers have fresh positive evidence.

M231 completed: GSP replayed Datoviz api/pre-rc-cleanup at af168b5a9 and now accepts Datoviz DvzResult mutator success codes; post-refactor S028 replay improved 10 Datoviz rows from crashed to strict with no regressions, leaving 4 SIGSEGV rows. M222 remains blocked because Texture2D-specific sampler/origin/color-role/unlit-equation evidence is still absent.

M232 completed: GSP replayed Datoviz api/pre-rc-cleanup at 1ef626a56; fast adapter validation passed, the latest S028 matrix matched M231 exactly with 52 strict, 4 adapted, 4 crashed, zero regressions, and zero improvements, and M222 remains blocked pending Texture2D sampler/origin/unmanaged-RGBA/unlit-equation evidence.
